# Resources.LegacyResourceNotFoundCode field

The LEGACY resource-not-found code, `-32002`. An earlier protocol revision used this for the not-found condition; for interoperability a client SHOULD treat it as resource-not-found in ADDITION to `-32602`. A modern server MUST NOT mint it. (§17.6, R-17.6-c)

```csharp
public const int LegacyResourceNotFoundCode;
```
